description_long: This bungalow features a rustic wooden exterior with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade is adorned with a large window box filled with red flowers, and a wooden porch with railings extends across the front. The structure is surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and a patch of green grass, enhancing its cozy, residential appeal. The side views reveal additional windows and a covered side porch, while the rear includes a smaller gabled entryway. The roof is steeply pitched, and the overall design is compact yet inviting, with natural wood tones dominating the palette. The architectural details, such as the exposed beams and flower boxes, evoke a Craftsman-style charm.
description: A cozy wooden bungalow with a steep gable roof, front porch, and flower boxes, surrounded by hedges and grass. The design features natural wood tones and Craftsman-style details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main window with flower box, central porch, and symmetrical wooden railings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended porch, side windows, and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smaller gabled entryway and the back porch area, with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side porch, additional windows, and the continuation of the hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
